description: ExposoGraph 3.0 port datatype vocabulary (Layer 0 Phase 2). Controlled vocabulary of dtypes used across all 8 module ports, enabling type-checked cross-module wiring.

port_types.label: Concentration (micromolar)
port_types.description: Molar concentration of a chemical species (carcinogen substrate or metabolite) in micromolar units. Used as input to biotransformation and exposure modules.

port_types.label: Genotype Activity Multiplier
port_types.description: Scaling factor for enzyme Vmax derived from metabolizer phenotype or allelic diplotype. PM=0.0, IM=0.5, NM=1.0, RM=1.5, UM=2.0. Used by the PopGen modifier and Flux modules.

port_types.label: Exposure Multiplier
port_types.description: Dimensionless scaling factor representing exposure intensity relative to an unexposed baseline. Derived from exposure scenario classification in the Wave2 exposure module.

port_types.label: Biotransformation Flux Ratio
port_types.description: Ratio of activation flux to detoxification flux: activation_score / detoxification_score. Values >1 indicate net activation predominance. Core output of the Flux/Biotransformation module consumed by MutSig and Interaction modules.

port_types.label: Activation Score
port_types.description: Summed activation flux computed as Σ(Vmax·[S]/(Km+[S])) for activation enzymes, scaled by tissue expression weight and genotype multiplier.

port_types.label: Detoxification Score
port_types.description: Summed detoxification flux for detox enzymes (GSTs, UGTs, ALDH). Complement to activation_score in flux_ratio computation.

port_types.label: ROS Burden Score
port_types.description: Aggregate reactive oxygen species burden score derived from biotransformation outputs and metal exposures. Used as both input (upstream ROS) and output (computed aggregate ROS) of the OxStress mechanism module.

port_types.label: Oxidative Adduct Score
port_types.description: Predicted score for oxidative DNA adducts (8-OHdG, Oxo_dG type) derived from ROS burden level in the OxStress module.

port_types.label: DNA Repair Capacity Index
port_types.description: Index from 0 to 1 representing available DNA repair enzyme capacity. Output of the OxStress mechanism module.

port_types.label: GSH Pool Fraction
port_types.description: Remaining fraction of the glutathione (GSH) pool relative to baseline. 1.0 = replete, 0.0 = depleted. Internal state exported by the Interaction module and consumed by OxStress.

port_types.label: Tissue Expression Weight
port_types.description: Normalised gene expression weight for a given tissue, derived from GTEx nTPM data. Used by TissueContext module to scale biotransformation scores. nTPM[gene][tissue] / max_tissue_nTPM.

port_types.label: Carcinogen Class
port_types.description: Controlled vocabulary key for carcinogen class: PAH | Aflatoxin | Aldehyde | Nitrosamine | NDMA | HCA | Benzene | HeavyMetal | Dioxin | ChlorinatedSolvent | Mycotoxin | Alcohol | AromaticAmine | Other. Used by Exposure and MutSig modules.

port_types.label: Exposure Scenario
port_types.description: Controlled exposure scenario identifier: unexposed | general_population | smoker | occupational_high | endemic. Used by the Exposure Source module to select dose parameters.

port_types.label: Gene Symbol
port_types.description: HGNC gene symbol string identifying an enzyme or gene of interest (e.g. CYP1A1, GSTM1, NAT2). Used by TissueContext, Modifier, and EvidenceProvenance modules.

port_types.label: Tissue Name
port_types.description: Controlled tissue identifier from the scope.tissues vocabulary: Liver | Lung | Prostate | Bladder | Colon | Breast | Kidney | Esophagus. Used by TissueContext and Flux modules.

port_types.label: Substrate Identifier
port_types.description: Registry node identifier for a substrate or metabolite (e.g. BaP_epoxide, BPDE, Acetaldehyde_int). Used by EvidenceProvenance module as input.

port_types.label: Inducer Context
port_types.description: Controlled vocabulary for co-exposure induction context: smoking | chronic_alcohol | TCDD_dioxin | none. Used by the Interaction mechanism module.

port_types.label: Boolean Flag
port_types.description: A binary true/false flag. Used for synergy_flag and antagonism_flag outputs of the Interaction mechanism module.

port_types.label: COSMIC SBS Signature
port_types.description: COSMIC mutational signature identifier in the SBS (single base substitution) format, e.g. SBS4, SBS6, SBS22. Primary output of the MutSig outcome module.

port_types.label: Dominant Mutation Type
port_types.description: Predicted dominant mutation category, e.g. G→T transversion, C→A transversion, C→T transition. Output of the MutSig outcome module.

port_types.label: Confidence Level
port_types.description: Categorical confidence tier: high | medium | exploratory. Output of the MutSig module indicating evidence quality for predicted signature assignment.

port_types.label: Flux Ratio Map
port_types.description: A dictionary/map from enzyme identifier to adjusted flux ratio (float). Output of the Interaction module after competitive inhibition adjustments.

port_types.label: Substrate Concentration Map
port_types.description: A dictionary/map from substrate identifier to concentration in micromolar. Input to the Interaction module for co-exposure mixture modelling.

port_types.label: Enzyme Genotype Map
port_types.description: A dictionary/map from enzyme gene symbol to metabolizer phenotype string (PM|IM|NM|RM|UM). Input to the Interaction module.

port_types.label: Metal Exposure Map
port_types.description: A dictionary/map from metal class identifier (Arsenic, Cadmium, Chromium, Nickel) to concentration. Input to the OxStress mechanism module.

port_types.label: Genotype Context Map
port_types.description: Optional map from enzyme gene symbol to diplotype/phenotype modifier. Input to the Exposure Source module.

port_types.label: Adduct Type List
port_types.description: List of DNA adduct type identifiers predicted from graph for a given carcinogen. Input to the MutSig outcome module.

port_types.label: Daily Intake (ug/kg/day)
port_types.description: Estimated daily carcinogen intake in micrograms per kilogram body weight per day. Output of the Exposure Source module.

port_types.label: Provenance Record
port_types.description: Structured provenance object containing kinetic parameter sources (Km, Ki, Vmax), confidence ratings, PMID references, species context, and assay metadata. Primary output of the EvidenceProvenance module.
